# ProxyWhirl

> Production-grade Python proxy rotation library with live proxy lists, REST API, MCP server, and canonical Fumadocs documentation.

## Start Here

- [Documentation home](https://www.proxywhirl.com/docs)
- [Quickstart](https://www.proxywhirl.com/docs/quickstart)
- [Guides](https://www.proxywhirl.com/docs/guides)
- [Concepts](https://www.proxywhirl.com/docs/concepts)
- [Interfaces (REST + MCP)](https://www.proxywhirl.com/docs/interfaces)
- [Reference](https://www.proxywhirl.com/docs/reference)

## Generated Reference

- [Python API](https://www.proxywhirl.com/docs/generated/python-api)
- [CLI reference](https://www.proxywhirl.com/docs/generated/cli-reference)
- [REST API summary](https://www.proxywhirl.com/docs/generated/rest-api)
- [OpenAPI endpoints](https://www.proxywhirl.com/docs/api/openapi)
- [Proxy sources catalog](https://www.proxywhirl.com/docs/generated/proxy-sources)
- [Rotation strategies](https://www.proxywhirl.com/docs/generated/strategies)

## Key Guides

- [Clients (sync/async)](https://www.proxywhirl.com/docs/guides/clients)
- [Configuration](https://www.proxywhirl.com/docs/guides/configuration)
- [Custom strategies](https://www.proxywhirl.com/docs/guides/custom-strategies)
- [Retry & failover](https://www.proxywhirl.com/docs/guides/retry-failover)
- [Deployment](https://www.proxywhirl.com/docs/guides/deployment)
- [Troubleshooting](https://www.proxywhirl.com/docs/guides/troubleshooting)

## Live Assets

- [HTTP proxy list](https://www.proxywhirl.com/proxy-lists/http.txt)
- [All proxies](https://www.proxywhirl.com/proxy-lists/all.txt)
- [Rich JSON export](https://www.proxywhirl.com/proxy-lists/proxies-rich.json)

- [GitHub](https://github.com/wyattowalsh/proxywhirl)
- [AGENTS.md](https://github.com/wyattowalsh/proxywhirl/blob/main/AGENTS.md)
